summary: Good matrix‑derived recording that sounds great, with Black Peter highlighted as a solid moment.
review: The second set from December 27 1982 is praised for its overall sonic clarity – Joani’s taping of the MSCs yields a clean matrix mix that many listeners describe as “incredible.”  While the show isn’t dissected track‑by‑track, reviewers note a strong New Year vibe and single out Black Peter as a standout performance.  Opinions on the release are mixed, ranging from enthusiastic five‑star praise to more neutral three‑star commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are few and varied, but the majority highlight good sound quality and a solid performance, leading to an overall above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Joani taped the MSCs used for this set, resulting in a clear matrix mix; no specific flaws are reported, and listeners describe the sound as “incredible.”

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on pacing, but reviewers convey a strong New‑Year energy and overall enjoyment of the set.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for bringing “Persian love” to the performance.
